title: RemakeEngine Module Tools Manifest (Tools.toml)
description: Schema for declaring module-specific tool requirements. Uses [[tool]] array-of-tables. Archives and installs are centralized under ProjectRoot/EngineApps/Tools by the engine runtime.

destination.description: Deprecated. Runtime ignores this field and stores archives under ProjectRoot/EngineApps/Tools/_archives.

unpack.description: Whether the downloaded artifact needs unpacking into the centralized install folder.

unpack_destination.description: Deprecated. Runtime ignores this field and unpacks into ProjectRoot/EngineApps/Tools/ToolName-Version-Platform.
